input.title: Weekly Meeting Notes 2026-04-15
input.content:
This week we discussed the Q2 roadmap. We decided to launch the AI enrichment module next week, including tag suggestions, summaries, and TODO extraction.

Action items:
- Alex will deliver the technical design by Friday
- Jamie will track progress and share daily updates
- Taylor will prepare the load test report and deliver it by next Monday

Risk: if the LLM provider has high latency, we need a local Ollama fallback.
